channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] I published the architecture Anthropic is now shippingstamped proof
item.description:
📊 Score: 135 | Category: 大V/权威

  • Source:Hacker News(+10)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)

item.title: [2] [模型算法] GPU-Accelerated Optimization of Transformer-Based Neural Networks for Real-Time Inference
item.description:
📊 Score: 121 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:tensorrt(+25)
  • L3-Tech:transformer(+15)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: This paper presents the design and evaluation of a GPU-accelerated inference pipeline for transformer models using NVIDIA TensorRT with mixed-precision optimization. We evaluate BERT-base (110M parameters) and GPT-2 (124M parameters) across batch sizes from 1 to 32 and sequence lengths from 32 to 512. The system achieves up to 64.4x speedup over CP...

item.title: [3] [模型算法] DreamLite: A Lightweight On-Device Unified Model for Image Generation and Editing
item.description:
📊 Score: 117 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:on-device(+40)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Diffusion models have made significant progress in both text-to-image (T2I) generation and text-guided image editing. However, these models are typically built with billions of parameters, leading to high latency and increased deployment challenges. While on-device diffusion models improve efficiency, they largely focus on T2I generation and lack s...
